violations.text: A utensil with raw meat debris and scrubbing pad were observed in the front hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

The establishment was observed vacuum packaging raw beef product without prior approval or submittal of approved HACCP plan. Establishment is to cease all vacuum packaging until approval is given. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025
The plumbing under the hand wash sink in the ware-washing area was in poor repair (bottom area leaks when in use). New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the meat retail area do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025

The ceiling in the retail meat area and the wall behind the meat prep table in the walk-in cooler were covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Per interview with PIC, damaged tiles will be replaced by 5/27/25. All other tiles in area by 'Correct-by-date'. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025
The floor in the walk-in cooler/meat processing area closest to the floor drain is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025
